item.title: 👍Anthony Mixer - Citizen Volunteer Lobbyist
item.description: Anthony Mixer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Citizen Volunteer Lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Curtis Steinhauer - Washington State Association of County Regional Planning Directors
item.description: Curtis Steinhauer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of County Regional Planning Directors. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Andrea Smiley signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Building Industry Association of Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.
